message:
fix(cli,tools): remove database path plumbing from guard installation

Now that the guard plugin reads reservations directly from the archive
directory instead of querying SQLite, the db_path parameter is no
longer needed:

cli/lib.rs:
- Remove DbPoolConfig/sqlite_path resolution and abs_db_path
  computation from handle_guard Install branch
- Update install_guard() call to match new 3-parameter signature
- Extract resolve_guard_archive_root_for_check() helper from inline
  guard check logic, using path_is_real_directory() for symlink-safe
  file_reservations/ detection
- Move path_is_real_directory() earlier in the file (was duplicated)
- Update doctor fix path to use new install_guard() signature

tools/reservations.rs:
- Remove DbPoolConfig/sqlite_path resolution, abs_db_path computation,
  and the in-memory database validation check from
  install_precommit_guard()
- Simplify to direct install_guard() call with project_key, repo_path,
  and prepush flag

Adds tests for archive root resolution preferring real project
archives and ignoring symlinked repo file_reservations directories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
